THE SITUATION IN THE UNITED STATES (Source: "MORBIDITY AND MORTALITY-WEEKLY REPORT", U.S. National Office of Vital Statistics): Number of reported cases for the current week (previous week in parentheses):

Of the 45 cases of diphtheria reported this week, one-third (15) were in Alabama. Twenty cases were reported in Florida (8), South Carolina (7), and North Carolina (5). The remainder were in 7 scattered states.
